title: BEM-844 process triad
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-25 | 07:27 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b842=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_after_response_probe_tick.json')
b843=load('governance/state/bem843_execute_bem842_next.json')
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        try: data=json.loads(read(p))
        except Exception as exc: data={'status':'unparsed','error':str(exc),'text':read(p)[:500]}
        results.append({'path':str(p),'data':data})
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            if bad: blockers.append(str(p))
            elif ok: real.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt})
missing=[]
if not results: missing.append('workflow_dispatch_results')
if not (runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at')): missing.append('claude_runtime_state')
if not real: missing.append('real_claude_response')
created_files=[]
if not missing:
    latest=real[-1]
    proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM844_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL.md')
    proto.write_text('# BEM-844 | Agreed Multi-Agent Development Protocol | 2026-05-25 | 07:27 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'| Раздел | Согласованное правило | Доказательство |'+sep+'|---|---|---|'+sep+'| Контур | GPT внешний аудитор ведёт roadmap, Claude internal auditor отвечает через mailbox | Real Claude response: '+latest['path']+' |'+sep+'| PASS gate | PASS только при наличии dispatch-result, runtime-state и real Claude response | BEM-819/BEM-842/BEM-844 |'+sep+'| Operator relay | Оператор не является relay для routine-loop | Contract extension / pending artifacts |'+sep+'| Bad JSON | Битый queue JSON архивируется и не валит runner | BEM-827 processor hardening |'+sep+'| Следующий этап | Реализовать протокол по P0/P1 после подтверждения operator-visible proof | Этот файл |'+sep+sep+'## Source Claude response'+sep+sep+'```text'+sep+latest['text'][:4000]+sep+'```'+sep)
    status='agreed_protocol_created'
    next_action='operator-visible report and continue roadmap implementation'
    created_files.append(str(proto))
elif missing[0]=='workflow_dispatch_results':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 dispatch-result missing repair','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch result'
    created_files.append(str(p))
elif missing[0]=='claude_runtime_state':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 runtime-state missing repair','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
    created_files.append(str(p))
else:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_real_response_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 real-response missing repair','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='real_response_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real response'
    created_files.append(str(p))
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'bem842_status':b842.get('status'),'bem843_status':b843.get('status'),'missing':missing,'dispatch_results_count':len(results),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'real_response_count':len(real),'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_process_triad_or_continue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_process_triad_or_continue.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Process Triad Or Continue | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_process_triad_or_continue.json','governance/reports/bem844_process_triad_or_continue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Processed triad proofs: created agreed protocol if all proofs exist, otherwise queued repair for the first missing proof')
